title: JR Conjures a Mountainous Illusion Out of the Pont Neuf in Paris
summary_full: Four decades after the conceptual artist Christo draped the Pont Neuf with fabric, JR, a French street artist, offers his own trick of the eye.
summary_public: Four decades after the conceptual artist Christo draped the Pont Neuf with fabric, JR, a French street artist, offers his own trick of the eye.
